category.scope_note: LED luminaire and light source compliance comparison for Chinese manufacturers exporting to the Senegalese market.

title.en: China-to-Senegal LED Luminaire Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国 LED 灯具进入塞内加尔：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國 LED 燈具進入塞內加爾：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China LED luminaire documentation against Senegalese market-access requirements: ASN (Association Senegalaise de Normalisation) NS standards adopting IEC 60598 / 62560 / 62471, Ministry of Trade pre-export verification of conformity (PEC/VoC), energy labelling, ARTP radio approval for smart luminaires, and French-language documentation, versus Chinese GB standards and CCC certification.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国 LED 灯具文件与塞内加尔市场准入要求差距对照：塞内加尔标准化协会（ASN）采用 IEC 60598 / 62560 / 62471 的 NS 标准、贸易部出口前符合性验证（PEC/VoC）、能效标签、智能灯具的 ARTP 无线电核准及法语文件，与中国 GB 标准及 CCC 认证对比。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國 LED 燈具文件與塞內加爾市場准入要求差距對照：塞內加爾標準化協會（ASN）採用 IEC 60598 / 62560 / 62471 的 NS 標準、貿易部出口前符合性驗證（PEC/VoC）、能效標籤、智能燈具的 ARTP 無線電核准及法語文件，與中國 GB 標準及 CCC 認證對比。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment determination, product safety determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Senegalese law, ASN/NS standards, Ministry of Trade conformity (PEC/VoC) requirements, ARTP radio rules, energy labelling rules, and French-language documentation obligations with qualified professionals and the in-country importer before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定认定、产品安全认定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士及在地进口商核验现行塞内加尔法律、ASN/NS 标准、贸易部符合性（PEC/VoC）要求、ARTP 无线电规则、能效标签规则及法语文件义务。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定認定、產品安全認定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士及在地進口商核驗現行塞內加爾法律、ASN/NS 標準、貿易部符合性（PEC/VoC）要求、ARTP 無線電規則、能效標籤規則及法語文件義務。

answer_first.en: A Chinese LED luminaire manufacturer exporting to Senegal should expect ASN/NS standards that adopt the IEC base (NS/IEC 60598-1 for luminaire safety, IEC 62560 for self-ballasted lamps, IEC 62471 for photobiological safety) and a Ministry of Trade conformity / pre-export verification of conformity (PEC/VoC) pathway for regulated imports, rather than the EU CE self-declaration model. Practical points: the grid is 230 V / 50 Hz (50 Hz matches China, but nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V), so rating and marking must suit 230 V; documentation must be in French and routed through an in-country importer; smart/wireless luminaires need ARTP radio approval; energy-efficiency labelling may apply under national energy programmes. Senegal does not operate an EU-style horizontal RoHS, REACH-SVHC, or battery regime, so map the EU 'ecodesign' lane to local energy labelling and the 'rohs' lane honestly — there is no horizontal RoHS substance-restriction law in Senegal as of this review; verify the current PEC/VoC scope and energy programme with ASN and the importer. China CCC and GB/GB-T evidence do not automatically satisfy Senegalese conformity verification.
answer_first.zh: 向塞内加尔出口的中国 LED 灯具制造商应预期采用以 IEC 为基础的 ASN/NS 标准（灯具安全 NS/IEC 60598-1、自镇流灯 IEC 62560、光生物安全 IEC 62471），以及对受管制进口适用的贸易部符合性／出口前符合性验证（PEC/VoC）路径，而非欧盟 CE 自我声明模式。实务要点：电网为 230 V / 50 Hz（50 Hz 与中国相同，但标称电压不同于中国的 220/380 V），故额定值和标识须适配 230 V；文件须为法语并经由在地进口商办理；智能／无线灯具须取得 ARTP 无线电核准；能效标签可能依据国家能源计划适用。截至本次审阅，塞内加尔不实施欧盟式横向 RoHS、REACH-SVHC 或电池法规，故将欧盟 ecodesign 项对应至本地能效标签，并诚实标注 rohs 项——塞内加尔没有横向 RoHS 物质限制法律；请与 ASN 及进口商核实现行 PEC/VoC 范围及能源计划。中国 CCC 与 GB/GB-T 证据不自动满足塞内加尔符合性验证。
answer_first.zht: 向塞內加爾出口的中國 LED 燈具製造商應預期採用以 IEC 為基礎的 ASN/NS 標準（燈具安全 NS/IEC 60598-1、自鎮流燈 IEC 62560、光生物安全 IEC 62471），以及對受管制進口適用的貿易部符合性／出口前符合性驗證（PEC/VoC）路徑，而非歐盟 CE 自我聲明模式。實務要點：電網為 230 V / 50 Hz（50 Hz 與中國相同，但標稱電壓不同於中國的 220/380 V），故額定值和標識須適配 230 V；文件須為法語並經由在地進口商辦理；智能／無線燈具須取得 ARTP 無線電核准；能效標籤可能依據國家能源計劃適用。截至本次審閱，塞內加爾不實施歐盟式橫向 RoHS、REACH-SVHC 或電池法規，故將歐盟 ecodesign 項對應至本地能效標籤，並誠實標註 rohs 項——塞內加爾沒有橫向 RoHS 物質限制法律；請與 ASN 及進口商核實現行 PEC/VoC 範圍及能源計劃。中國 CCC 與 GB/GB-T 證據不自動滿足塞內加爾符合性驗證。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Each review cycle: re-verify ASN/NS standard adoptions of IEC 60598/62560/62471, the Ministry of Trade PEC/VoC scope for regulated imports, ARTP radio rules for wireless luminaires, and any national energy-labelling programme. Confirm whether Senegal has introduced any horizontal substance-restriction (RoHS-style) regime since this review.
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official or primary URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be true. Where a Senegalese requirement is asserted (PEC/VoC scope, ARTP approval, energy label), it must be confirmed against an ASN, Ministry of Trade, ARTP, or primary legal source; absence of an EU-style horizontal regime must be stated plainly rather than implied.
